name: Capcut Pro 35D Auto Renew is fully covered
description:
• Capcut Pro Team is valid for 35 days in Auto Renew form.
• Due to the Team format, Capcut cannot be used on the web, Capcut can only be used on phones and PCs.
• This form cannot change email or password.
• Date displayed is 7d but after 7d the tool will automatically add it to the new Team until 35d is reached (customers do not need to do anything).
• Full warranty in all cases, EXCEPT MAIL|PASS EXCHANGE

name: CDK ChatGPT Plus 1 month
description:
This is CDK chatGPT Plus, can upgrade the owner, extremely low death rate of 1-2%.
- Log in to GPT account on the web (can use PC or phone in web mode)
- Open a new tab, paste this line: https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session
- It will display the token line, copy the entire token 
- Open a new tap and paste the address
https://autosubai.com/

+ Step 1: paste the key
+ Step 2: Paste the Token
+ Step 3: Confirm
- 10 seconds and it's done
usageGuide:
- Đăng nhập acc GPT vào web (có thể dùng PC hoặc ĐT ở chế độ web)
- Mở 1 tab mới, dán dòng này vào: https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session
- Nó sẽ hiện dòng token, copy toàn bộ token đó 
- mởi 1 tap mới dán địa chỉ
https://autosubai.com/

+ Bước 1: dán key
+ Bước 2: Dán Token
+ Bước 3: Xác nhận
- 10s là xong

enriched.description: CDK ChatGPT Plus with owner upgrade capability. Extremely low death rate. Setup instructions: 1. Log in to GPT account on web (PC or phone). 2. Open new tab, paste: https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session. 3. Copy the token. 4. Go to https://autosubai.com/. 5. Step 1: Paste key. 6. Step 2: Paste token. 7. Step 3: Confirm. Done in 10 seconds!
enriched.warranty: 24-hour warranty from delivery. Replacement provided if account becomes inaccessible.
enriched.refund: Full replacement within 24 hours if the account is non-functional.
notes: Works on web, mobile, and desktop

name: CDK Plus 1 Year 1 month warranty
description:
Package information:
ChatGPT Plus 1 year, date 2027.
Use CDK to update date.
30 days warranty.
During the warranty period, if your account becomes free, PLEASE REUSE THE INCLUDED CDK: R_

Step 1: Log in to the GPT account that needs to be upgraded on the web
Step 2: Go to the website: https://receipt.nitro.xin/redeem/chatgpt, enter the previously purchased key in the first box and click check
Step 3: go to the link: https://chatgpt.com/api/auth/session, copy everything and paste it into the second box then press check
Step 4: Click start and wait for the website to upgrade the package

Note: In case the deposit is completed successfully but the account has not been updated with the package, please try reloading the page a few times. If you still don't see changes, log out and log back in to update the system. Absolutely do not use another CDK code to top up, to avoid losing the code.
--Pngoc--

name: Gemini AI Pro Verification
description:
Gemini AI Pro account verification (12 months duration).

Instructions for use:
• Requires valid Google email
• Password must be strong and unique
• 2FA secret is required for account security
• Verification requires reading the documentation
• Region and age verification required
• After subscription, change password and 2FA immediately
• Do not share credentials after purchase

Important notes:
• New accounts may trigger Google risk control (password/suspension risk)
• Network latency may cause delays - please retry if connection fails
• Family group accounts: Ensure no existing subscription in family
usageGuide: Provide Google email, password, and 2FA secret to complete account setup. Follow all security instructions carefully.
